name: SEO Keyword Tracker — Exa Research + AI Analysis to Sheets
description: Searches for ranking content around target keywords via Exa, uses Claude AI to analyze keyword positions and competitive landscape, and saves the structured analysis to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Track SEO keyword rankings with Bright Data MCP and GPT-5.2 AI analysis

keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords to track (e.g. 'ai agents, workflow automation, no-code tools')

domain.description: Your domain to track rankings for (e.g. 'example.com')

code.source:
var keywords = $.input.keywords.split(',').map(function(k) { return k.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
return { keywords: keywords, count: keywords.length };

steps.name: Compile ranking data from all keyword searches
Build AI prompt for SEO analysis
Run Claude AI for SEO analysis
Parse AI response and strip fences
Build data rows for Google Sheets
Save ranking data to Google Sheets
